parameters.content:
Flow 

[Manual Trigger]
      │
[ONE Code Node]
 Returns 4 individual items
 {roll_no:1}, {roll_no:2}
 {roll_no:3}, {roll_no:4}
      │
[Loop Over Items]  ◄──────────────────┐
      │                                │
      ├── [Loop Branch]                │
      │         │                      │
      │  [Data Table - Get Row]        │
      │   Table : ClassInfo            │
      │   Row ID: {{$json.roll_no}}    │
      │         │                      │
      │         └────────────────────► ┘
      │         (repeats 4 times)
      │
      └── [Done Branch]
                │
        [Final Code Node]
        "All rows extracted"

"When Execute is clicked the Code node returns 4 roll numbers as 4 separate items. The Loop Over Items node picks each roll number one by one and passes it to the Data Table Get Row node which fetches that specific student record from the ClassInfo table. This repeats 4 times until all students are fetched. Finally the Done branch triggers a completion summary."
